cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]číslici 3[/hlp] ve stylu digitálního displeje (vodorovné tahy 60 bodů, svislý tah 80 bodů). Střední tah se kreslí zvlášť po zvednutí pera.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_right" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="160" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b3" x="300" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b4" x="20" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b5" x="160" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b6" x="300" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b7" x="20" y="220"></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b8" x="160" y="220"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b9" x="300" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b10" x="20" y="320"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b11" x="160" y="320"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></xml>
